SQL Query: SELECT SUM(FibrinogenConcentration) AS FibrinogenConcentration FROM (SELECT FibrinogenConcentration AS FibrinogenConcentration FROM PerioperativeHemostasisBenchmarks WHERE PatientEpisodeID = "EP-OR-2024-00490 combined valve replacement and CABG episode" AND SurgicalHemorrhageGrade = "arterial spurting localized to anastomotic suture line requiring oversew" AND AntifibrinolyticExposure = "single pre-incision bolus tranexamic acid administered without infusion" AND ViscoelasticIndexDescriptor = "platelet dysfunction signature with preserved fibrinogen-amplitude but low MA morphology" UNION ALL SELECT FibrinogenConcentration AS FibrinogenConcentration FROM PerioperativeHemostasisBenchmarks WHERE PatientEpisodeID = "EP-OR-2024-00127 registry entry from cardiothoracic cohort" AND SurgicalHemorrhageGrade = "persistent microvascular bleeding refractory to conventional topical agents" AND AntifibrinolyticExposure = "no antifibrinolytic agent administered during perioperative interval" AND ViscoelasticIndexDescriptor = "mixed pattern with delayed initiation followed by accelerated lysis phase" UNION ALL SELECT FibrinogenConcentration AS FibrinogenConcentration FROM PerioperativeHemostasisBenchmarks WHERE PatientEpisodeID = "EP-OR-2024-00314 vascular bypass procedure episode" AND SurgicalHemorrhageGrade = "surgical field obscuration by mixed arterial and venous bleeding necessitating temporary packing" AND AntifibrinolyticExposure = "continuous intraoperative aminocaproic infusion with postoperative taper" AND ViscoelasticIndexDescriptor = "normal coagulation trace with isolated prolonged clot formation time indicating factor depletion");
